Name: FAnimNode_CopyBone
Description: Simple controller to copy a bone's transform to another one.

Variables.Name: SourceBone
Variables.Description: Source Bone Name to get transform from

Variables.Name: TargetBone
Variables.Description: Name of bone to control. This is the main bone chain to modify from.

Variables.Name: ControlSpace
Variables.Description: Space to convert transforms into prior to copying components
